# ICompletionCatalog.PromptArgumentNames method

Resolves the declared argument names of a prompt, or `null` when the prompt is unknown.

```csharp
public IReadOnlyList<string>? PromptArgumentNames(string name)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| name | The prompt name. |

## Return Value

The declared argument names, or `null` when unknown.
